summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Iqro Interaktif. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passing covering auth (register/login/me/logout/dup/wrong-pwd), materials list (6 items, locks correct), material detail (401 unauth, 423 locked, 200 unlocked with html), progress upsert+get, comments (public GET, auth POST, owner/admin DELETE, 403 non-owner), admin endpoints (stats, users list, CRUD on materials, 403 for non-admin). Frontend: end-to-end register -> library (6 cards; Iqro 1-4 'Belum Tersedia'; 5 & 6 'Mulai Belajar') -> viewer (iframe renders Iqro 5 HTML, 50% progress button persists, comment 'TEST komentar' posts) -> dashboard (shows 8% overall + per-material progress including 'Iqro 5 50% selesai') -> admin login -> admin panel (stats cards 6/6/2/1, materials table 6 rows, users tab, upload form). All flows functional in Bahasa Indonesia.

minor.issue: Pydantic EmailStr rejects .local TLD (reserved); not a bug, just be aware when seeding test users use real TLDs

issues: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 on every page load for guests, logged as console error. Functional but noisy. Consider 204/empty for unauth or silent client handling.

action_items: (Optional) CORS_ORIGINS in /app/backend/.env points to an old preview host (0c705fea-...) — current frontend is on knowledge-base-666.preview.emergentagent.com. Same-origin via ingress so it works today, but update CORS_ORIGINS to match the real frontend URL to be safe against future cross-origin scenarios.
(Optional) Silence /api/auth/me 401 for guests on landing (skip call when no token / catch in AuthContext).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: solid structure (~480 lines). bcrypt hash format $2b, httpOnly+secure+samesite=none cookies set correctly, _id excluded everywhere via projection, EmailStr validation, Pydantic input validation on all endpoints, uuid IDs (no Mongo ObjectId leak), proper 401/403/404/423 status codes with Indonesian messages, async/await throughout, indexes on email/id/volume/(user_id,material_id), seed_admin updates password if mismatch (idempotent). No file-size or DRY issues.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@iqro.com / Admin@2025 (seeded). Regular users created via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Tests create disposable users with test_<rand>@example.com and one TEST comment (auto-cleaned by admin delete in comment-flow test). One TEST material (vol 7) created+updated+deleted within admin CRUD test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iqro_api.py run with: pytest backend/tests/test_iqro_api.py -v. Use @example.com (not @iqro.local — EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs). Admin seeded via lifespan; if you change ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env restart backend so seed_admin can update the hash. Frontend uses httpOnly cookies w/ requests.Session() — credentials propagate automatically.
